rules.name: Loading state required
rules.description: Every async operation that takes >200ms must show a loading indicator
rules.check: After triggering API call, verify spinner/skeleton is visible before data loads

rules.name: Error feedback required
rules.description: Every failed operation must show an error message to the user
rules.check: Force API error (mock 500), verify toast or inline error message appears

rules.name: Success feedback required
rules.description: Save/create/delete operations must confirm success to the user
rules.check: After successful PATCH/POST/DELETE, verify success toast appears

rules.name: Empty state design
rules.description: Sections with no data must show a helpful empty state, not blank space
rules.check: Open section with no data, verify empty state message or illustration visible

rules.name: Dirty guard protection
rules.description: Users must be warned before losing unsaved changes
rules.check: Edit a field, try to navigate to another section, verify confirmation dialog appears

rules.name: Permission-denied clarity
rules.description: Non-editable sections must clearly indicate read-only state, not just disabled controls
rules.check: Login as non-GVCN role, open section, verify visual indication of read-only mode

rules.name: Navigation feedback
rules.description: Active section must be highlighted in sidebar after navigation
rules.check: Click section in sidebar, verify it becomes active/highlighted

rules.name: Form validation proximity
rules.description: Validation errors must appear near the invalid field, not only in toast
rules.check: Submit form with invalid data, verify error indicator near the field

rules.name: Keyboard accessibility
rules.description: All interactive elements must be reachable via keyboard (Tab, Enter, Escape)
rules.check: Navigate entire section using only keyboard, verify all actions accessible

rules.name: Response time perception
rules.description: Operations completing in <100ms need no feedback. 100ms-1s need progress. >1s need loading.
